hooks.command: python3 -c "import json; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': 'STANDING RULE: After any Northern Widget library or hardware repo release, check the relevant library header (ADR_DEFAULT or begin(uint8_t ADR_ = 0xNN)) and firmware (Wire.begin(ADR)) for I2C address changes. If anything changed, update the address table in _pages/sensors.md and the Last verified date. Repos to watch: Apis_Library, Project-Haar/Haar_Library, Project-Libelle/Libelle_Library, Project-Liasis/Liasis_Library, T9602_Library, Project-Tally/Tally_Library, Project-Walrus/Walrus_Library.'}}))"
hooks.statusMessage: Loading NW I2C address maintenance rule...
